x_posts.content:

Ready to build your team?

EXECUTIVE starting at $1,299/mo.

The other 18%? They're hoping their competitors move slower.

Human assistant: $40K+/year, 40 hrs/week, needs sleep.

The math isn't complicated.

82% of companies will integrate AI agents in 3 years.

The other 18%? They're hoping their competitors move slower.

youtube_videos.title: I Built an AI Team That Works 24/7 — Here's What Happened

youtube_videos.script_intro: What if you could clone yourself? Not science fiction — AI agents make it possible. Today I'm showing you exactly how I built an AI team that never sleeps, never calls in sick, and costs a fraction of a human employee.

Week 1: The learning curve and first wins

Month 1: The ROI was insane
